title: Remote assistance — admin live screen viewport fix
description:
Fixes remote help on pipeshare.live where the admin panel showed "Connected" but the customer viewport stayed empty with ghosted UI behind it and status stuck on "Waiting for customer to finish screen share…".

Root cause: WebRTC offer path incorrectly marked the remote SDP as applied before the customer's answer arrived, so ICE candidates were dropped and the video track never connected. Status text was also overwritten after screen-ready had already been processed.

Admin remote panel now has a pop-out (⛶) full-screen viewport mode (TeamViewer-style), opaque black video area, and clearer status progression. Cache bust dbg162.

Who is affected: SaaS PipeShare admins using customer-initiated remote help over HTTPS (WebRTC). HTTP DOM frame relay unchanged.
changeLog: Fix WebRTC ICE: do not treat local offer as remote description set.
Re-queue ICE candidates when addIceCandidate fails due to SDP timing.
Fix admin status overwriting after screen-ready / offer sent.
Admin remote panel: pop-out full-screen viewport (⛶ button).
Viewport: solid black background (no admin panel bleed-through).
Video playback retries on loadedmetadata; dbg162 cache bust.
